rationale: Educ. Code §37.011 governs juvenile justice alternative education programs. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homesteadexemption amounts. No operative provision depends on or is affected by the proposed exemption increase.
quote: Sec. 37.011. JUVENILE JUSTICE ALTERNATIVE EDUCATION PROGRAM.
_note: No conflict found. The rule concerns juvenile justice alternative education program establishment, operation, and funding; it contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
